payload.answer: The new fact supersedes the existing current employment fact. Record Goldman as former employment and Point72 as current employment.
citations: Existing current fact: Sam works at Goldman
New fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the same person, Sam, and provides a clear employment transition from Goldman to Point72.

details: Avoided keeping the superseded Goldman employment as current.
Committed only the durable post-transition state and historical prior employer.

repair_options: Mark the Goldman employment fact as no longer current.
Add a new current fact that Sam works at Point72.
Optionally retain a historical fact that Sam previously worked at Goldman.
